subject: Re:
body:
Bruno Le Maire criticizes the French PM for failing to present efficient solutions to the crisis in Syria. Instead the PM has been merely following the course of Obama, who, according to Bruno, does not know what he wants. Such an approach has weakened the influence of France on the international arena and has undermined its sovereignty.

Also watched some other videos of him - Bruno attacks Hollande for his tax policy and excuses him for "not knowing what he is doing"..
body_html:
Bruno Le Maire criticizes the French PM for failing to present efficient solutions to the crisis in Syria. Instead the PM has been merely following the course of Obama, who, according to Bruno, does not know what he wants. Such an approach has weakened the influence of France on the international arena and has undermined its sovereignty.

Also watched some other videos of him - Bruno attacks Hollande for his tax policy and excuses him for "not knowing what he is doing"..
